summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chat features (Community Chat + Group Chat). All 14 backend tests passed, and all 10 frontend UI test cases verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test chat messages created during testing (TEST_CHAT_*, TEST_PERSIST_*, TEST_GROUP_*). Jane Doe was temporarily added to group grp_07895f92 and then removed after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat feature is fully functional. Community chat GET is public, POST requires auth. Group chat GET/POST require auth AND group membership. ChatBox component polls every 5 seconds for new messages.
passed_tests: 1. Community Chat GET /api/chat/community - public read returns 200, no auth required
2. Community Chat POST /api/chat/community - returns 401 without auth
3. Community Chat POST /api/chat/community - returns 200 with auth, message persisted
4. Community Chat messages show sender name and timestamp
5. Group Chat GET /api/chat/group/{group_id} - returns 401 without auth
6. Group Chat POST /api/chat/group/{group_id} - returns 401 without auth
7. Group Chat GET/POST returns 403 for authenticated non-members
8. Group Chat GET/POST returns 200 for group members
9. Community Chat on Landing Page visible with 'Log in' prompt for guests
10. Community Chat on Member Dashboard with send functionality working

backend_test_details.TestCommunityChatPublicRead: Verified GET /api/chat/community is public, returns proper message structure
backend_test_details.TestCommunityChatAuthRequired: Verified POST requires auth, empty messages rejected, messages persist
backend_test_details.TestGroupChatMemberAccess: Verified non-member access returns 403, member access returns 200
backend_test_details.TestGroupChatWithNewGroup: Created test group, verified member can send/read messages

frontend_test_details.landing_page_community_chat: ChatBox rendered, messages displayed, 'Log in' prompt for guests, input hidden for guests
frontend_test_details.member_dashboard_community_chat: Community Chat tab, ChatBox with input field, send button, messages visible
frontend_test_details.property_detail_group_chat: Group Chat toggle button visible for members, chat opens inline, messages sent and received correctly
